strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and real-time infrastructure with DLang and Node.js at scale
Active contributor to agentic AI tooling (MCP code generators) and open-source AI-adjacent platforms like GISCollective
Demonstrated leadership in engineering culture through workshops, TDD advocacy, and CI/CD infrastructure setup
concerns: Lacks explicit evidence of multi-agent AI systems in production fintech or regulated environments
No clear track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or leading senior technical leadership layers
Limited visibility into financial systems expertise, credit risk modeling, or compliance infrastructure experience
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong technical depth in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and emerging AI tooling, with tangible contributions to agentic workflows and open-source infrastructure — but lacks demonstrated experience in regulated fintech domains, credit risk systems, and scaling senior engineering teams, which are critical for this executive role.
